verification_protocol.step_2: Validate computation_type is in allowed domain set
verification_protocol.step_3: Check timestamp_ms within ±5 minute drift window
verification_protocol.step_4: Check nonce not seen before (anti-replay table)
verification_protocol.step_6: Verify ML-DSA-65 detached signature over signing_message
verification_protocol.step_7_optional: Verify FALCON-512 + SLH-DSA (async sidecar for Full Path)

vectors.label: ADVERSARIAL_TAMPERED_COMMITMENT
vectors.expected_action: TCP_RST — commitment tampered, signature will not verify against modified substrate

vectors.label: ADVERSARIAL_NONCE_REPLAY
vectors.expected_action: TCP_RST — nonce replay detected (substrate identical to VEC 1, gateway must track seen nonces)

vectors.label: ADVERSARIAL_EXPIRED_TIMESTAMP
vectors.expected_action: TCP_RST — timestamp expired (>5 min drift, gateway must enforce clock skew window)

vectors.label: ADVERSARIAL_WRONG_KEY
vectors.expected_action: TCP_RST — ML-DSA-65 signature does not verify against production public key (signed by attacker key)
